creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port has the following tags, and needs to be removed:

	BROKEN=         this port does not build properly
	DEPRECATED=             no longer supported upstream
	EXPIRATION_DATE=        2011/09/04

	Please let me know if you feel it's Ok to remove it immediately.
	Otherwise, if it's not fixed it will be removed in 2 weeks.

Fix: 

DNA
How-To-Repeat: 	DNA
